subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath, through His bounty and grace, raised up His branches unto a station whereat the tongues of nations throughout the world shall speak forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی رفع افنانه بجوده و فضله الی مقام سوف ینطق لسان الامم فی العالم
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
